args:
set -eu
workdir=$(mktemp -d)
explain_json="$workdir/explain.json"
doctor_json="$workdir/doctor.json"
backend_plan_json="$workdir/backend-plan.json"
cache_plan_json="$workdir/cache-plan.json"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json > "$explain_json"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- doctor --format json > "$doctor_json"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- plan --format json --backend-family cuda-graphs --readiness performance > "$backend_plan_json"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- plan --format json --cache-namespace flashinfer-autotune-cache --readiness correctness > "$cache_plan_json"
python3 - "$explain_json" "$doctor_json" "$backend_plan_json" "$cache_plan_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
explain = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
doctor = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
backend_plan = json.load(open(sys.argv[3]))
cache_plan = json.load(open(sys.argv[4]))
assert explain['plan']['structural_identity']['plan_identity']
assert explain['verification']['status'] == 'Passed'
assert explain['backend_decision']['entries']
assert doctor['operating_system'] == 'Linux'
assert doctor['accelerator_vendor'] == 'Nvidia'
assert doctor['gpu_arches']
backend_regions = [region['name'] for region in backend_plan['compile_regions']]
assert 'decode_attention' in backend_regions, backend_regions
assert 'prefill_attention' not in backend_regions, backend_regions
cache_regions = [region['name'] for region in cache_plan['compile_regions']]
assert cache_regions == ['kv_cache_update'], cache_regions
PY
for readiness in correctness early-serve; do
  bundle_dir="$workdir/build-$readiness"
  build_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness "$readiness")
  printf '%s' "$build_out" | grep -q 'bundle='
  grep -q '"requested_regions":\["prefill_attention"\]' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
  grep -q '"scope_name":"prefill_attention"' "$bundle_dir/vllm_entrypoints.json"
done
if cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$workdir/invalid-decode" --backend-family cuda-graphs --readiness performance >"$workdir/invalid-decode.out" 2>"$workdir/invalid-decode.err"; then
  echo 'invalid decode-only build unexpectedly succeeded' >&2
  exit 1
fi
grep -q 'compile-region:decode_attention' "$workdir/invalid-decode.err"
if cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$workdir/invalid-cache" --cache-namespace flashinfer-autotune-cache --readiness correctness >"$workdir/invalid-cache.out" 2>"$workdir/invalid-cache.err"; then
  echo 'invalid cache-only build unexpectedly succeeded' >&2
  exit 1
fi
grep -q 'compile-region:kv_cache_update' "$workdir/invalid-cache.err"
printf 'fuzz-cli-surface-matrix\n'
